assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Authentication.CookieLifetime to 8 hours and Authentication.CookieSlidingExpiration to false
assertions.rationale: These are fairly standard ASP.NET Core/IdentityServer options that an LLM may know about.
This specific option is Duende-specific and not widely known without documentation.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: General knowledge would suggest server-side sessions are needed for session management.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to 'https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel'
assertions.rationale: BackChannelLogoutUri is a standard OIDC client property that an LLM would know.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has AccessTokenLifetime set to 300 (5 minutes)
assertions.rationale: While the LLM may set a short lifetime, it may not know the exact coordination requirement or set it to precisely 300.
